rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JANE PRICE WEAVER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #9, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The related trust was terminated in Nov 2020, but the trust accounting ran only to 5/31/20. No supplemental trust account was filed, despite $51,794.33 being transferred from this conservatorship to the trust after 5/31/20 and 6 months of Social Security and Wells Fargo Pension being received into the trust. Rather than filing a petition to approve supplemental account in the trust, Petitioner included a trust accounting in the supplemental declaration filed on 8/25/21. 2) Chase bank account ending 4616 is in the name of the trust. Petitioner alleges that he tried to open a new conservatorship account but the bank requested Conservatee's ID. He states that he will try again with his attorney or will close and open a new conservatorship account. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 10th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENT CHI KIN SUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Original financial account statement(s) must be filed to verify the ending balance of cash. [LRSF 14.35 D.] Schedule B (Receipts) is incomplete; it does not indicate the source of all receipts. [Prob. C. Sect. 1062(a).] There is no liabilities schedule in the accounting, although the administrator took out a $400,000 loan and it is unclear if previously ordered fees and costs have been paid yet. The Court-appointed attorney for the minors is missing from paragraph 32 of the petition (persons entitled to notice). Still no fee declaration has been filed in support of the request for attorney fees for extraordinary services. Full statutory fees will not be ordered until final distribution. (When there have been multiple accountings, it would be helpful if the calculation of the statutory fee showed in which accounting receipts, gains, or losses were reported.) (Rev. & Tax. C. Sect. 19513 was repealed and California does not have an estate tax or even a pick-up tax any longer.) Fees and costs previously ordered should not be part of this petition. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/21. As a result of the shortage of Court clerks, the amended pleading stamped as filed on 8/6/21 was not actually E-filed until 8/23/21, so not available to be viewed. Although it appears that a copy of the (unfiled) petition was mailed with the notice on 8/6/21, Counsel should check the Court's register of actions to make sure a pleading requiring notice has actually been E-filed before sending notice. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPHINE SIMMONS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/21. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The petition is incomplete. (See paragraphs 33 - 35.) Notice was not given to the former attorney for the executor or to the successor trustee of the devisee trust. (There is no need to continue to give notice to heirs who are not beneficiaries of the trust.) When did Harlan Simmons assign his share to Marquez Simmons? The only assignments filed in the proceeding appear to be the four assignments Marquez Simmons made. There was no claim filed by Quicken Loans, as alleged in paragraph 26. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/5/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. (Courtesy copies and proposed orders should not be stapled together as one document.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THEODORE TSAMISIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although not all acts of the executor are approved, merely confirmed or allowed, as she reportedly distributed estate assets without prior Court approval, and subparagraph d of paragraph 12 of the petition failed to fully disclose whether or not notice was required pursuant to Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) (whether heirs or beneficiaries were previously so confined), and no calculation of the statutory fee was shown. (The will was admitted on 7/9/19, not 3/25/19. The order appointing the executor was filed on 7/10/19, not 7/18/19.) NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate a proceeding must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution," or "Order Terminating Conservatorship [or Guardianship or Trust]." [LRSF 14.36 I.6.b.] When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES YEE CHIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. APPEARANCE FOR NO RESPONSE: If a hearing is continued for issues raised by an Examiner to be addressed and there is no response prior to the continued hearing date, the matter is automatically continued again, usually for one month. If there is still no response, an appearance is required. If no one appears after the automatic second continuance, the matter is ordinarily taken off calendar if it is not a compulsory petition, or an Order to Appear is issued. The executor is wasting the Court's resources. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be called with PTR-20-303964. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LIGONG HUANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/25/2021. 1) The Duties and Liabilities includes the attorney phone number. Petitioner must file a Duties and liabilities that includes the proposed personal representatives phone number. (See DE-147 page #2 #2) An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/11/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
